leadText: Overcoat (Japanese: ぼうじん Dustproof) is an Ability introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation V 1.1.2 Generation VI onward 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation V [ edit | edit source ] A Pokémon with Overcoat does not take damage from the weather conditions sandstorm and hailstorm . Generation VI onward [ edit | edit source ] Overcoat now also protects from powder and spore moves , as well as Effect Spore . Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Overcoat has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation V [ edit | edit source ] A Pokémon with Overcoat does not take damage from the weather conditions sandstorm and hailstorm . Generation VI onward [ edit | edit source ] Overcoat now also protects from powder and spore moves , as well as Effect Spore .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI Protects the Pokémon from weather that would damage it. * The Hail and Sandstorm weather conditions won't damage the Pokémon! * S MD Hail or a sandstorm won't damage the Pokémon! It also prevents the effects of the Effect Spore Ability and moves such as Poison Powder and Powder .
